name: Choco-Cinnamon Angel Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup sifted cake flour or all-purpose flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring egg whites to room temperature.
2. Sift together cake flour, powdered sugar, cocoa powder, and cinnamon; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg whites, cream of tartar, and vanilla extract with an electric mixer on medium speed until soft peaks form.
4. Gradually add sugar, 2 tablespoons at a time, beating on high speed until stiff peaks form.
5. Sift in one-fourth of the flour mixture over the beaten mixture and fold gently. Repeat, folding in the remaining mixture by fourths.
6. Pour batter into an ungreased tube pan.
7. Bake on the lowest rack of the oven at 350°F for 40-45 minutes or until the top springs back when lightly touched.
8. Immediately invert the cake onto a wire rack and allow to cool completely.
